channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Trump's defense pick Pete Hegseth faces deepening scrutiny in Senate
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Pete Hegseth, President-elect Donald Trump's pick for Defense Secretary, spent a second day Tuesday on Capitol Hill, meeting privately with Republican senators amid rising questions about his ability to effectively lead the Pentagon.
item.dc:creator: LISA MASCARO, MARY CLARE JALONICK and TARA COPP, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Garland, DOJ leads ask staffers to stay through Trump term: Report
item.description: Attorney General Merrick Garland is one of the top Justice Department officials asking staffers to stay with the agency, reports say.
item.dc:creator: Anna Kutz, NewsNation

item.title: Leadership teams, committee assignments set for 2025 Nevada Legislature
item.description: Leadership positions in the Nevada Legislature are falling into place with less than three months until the 2025 session convenes in Carson City.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: President-elect Donald Trump’s lawyers urge judge to toss his hush money conviction
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump’s lawyers formally asked a judge Monday to throw out his hush money criminal conviction, arguing that continuing the case would present unconstitutional “disruptions to the institution of the Presidency.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL R. SISAK and JAKE OFFENHARTZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump and Republican senators plan agenda for first 30 days
item.description: President-elect Donald Trump has dialed in to what was described as a “love fest” with Senate Republicans.
item.dc:creator: Lisa Mascaro And Mary Clare Jalonick, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Leticia Perez on way to reelection to 5th District Supervisor seat after final vote count released
item.description: Kern County 5th District Supervisor Leticia Perez appears headed to reelection, leading challenger Kim Salas by 133 votes in final vote count released by elections officials Tuesday afternoon.
item.dc:creator: Jose Franco, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jill Biden's final foreign trip as first lady will close with her and Trump at Notre Dame cathedral
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Jill Biden departed Tuesday on her final solo foreign trip as first lady, a six-day, four-country jaunt through Italy, the United Arab Emirates and Qatar that wraps with her and President-elect Donald Trump joining other dignitaries in Paris to celebrate the reopening of Notre Dame
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump’s DEA nominee withdraws from consideration just days after being picked
item.description: President-elect Trump’s choice to lead the Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA) announced on Tuesday he is withdrawing from consideration just three days after Trump made his nomination known.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox News Politics: Tipping the Scales to the Left
item.description: The Fox News Politics newsletter, with the latest updates on the Trump transition, exclusive interviews and more Fox News politics content.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DNC chair frontrunner offers 'uncomfortable' advice to Democrats after crushing loss to Trump
item.description: The candidate considered the frontrunner in the race to chair the DNC is proposing a "massive narrative and branding project" in the wake of November's election setbacks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: FBI has long been accused of politicization ahead of Dem concern over Kash Patel nomination
item.description: The FBI has long been accused of becoming mired in politics, long before President-elect Trump nominated Kash Patel to FBI director, sparking concern among Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: DNC chair candidate: Democrats must be willing to 'recenter' agenda
item.description: Ken Martin, chair of the Minnesota Democratic-Farm-Labor Party (DFL) and a candidate for the Democratic National Committee (DNC) chair, argued the party must be willing to “recenter” its agenda after it suffered a string of defeats during last month’s elections.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, NewsNation

item.title: California Assembly Speaker sets new bill limit for legislators
item.description: The California Assembly will limit the number of bills each legislature can introduce from 50 to 35, according to the house rules adopted at the start of the session on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Biden’s pardon of son Hunter threatens to tarnish legacy
item.description: President Biden’s decision to pardon his son Hunter in his final full month in the White House is threatening to erode his legacy as he prepares to leave office.
item.dc:creator: Brett Samuels, Fox 5

item.title: Trump appointments set off special elections to fill House seats: What to know
item.description: The move by President-elect Trump to tap several House Republicans to fill positions in his Cabinet and beyond has set off a fresh round of special elections next year to replace them. Trump chose Reps. Mike Waltz (R-Fla.) and Elise Stefanik (R-N.Y.) to be his national security adviser and U.S.
item.dc:creator: Caroline Vakil, Fox 5

item.title: Sen. Omar Fateh announces candidacy for Minneapolis mayor, says Frey is ‘failing’ residents
item.description: The first Somali elected to the Minnesota Senate is now seeking to lead the states largest city. Sen. Omar Fateh announced Monday he will challenge incumbent, and fellow DFLer Jacob Frey for the mayor’s office.
item.dc:creator: Cari Spencer, MPR News

item.title: Trump warns of 'hell to pay' if Hamas doesn't release hostages
item.description: President-elect Trump on Monday threatened to unleash “hell” in the Middle East if hostages held by Hamas in the Gaza Strip are not released before his inauguration Jan.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kelly, NewsNation

item.title: Wisconsin Democratic leader Ben Wikler enters the race to lead the national party
item.description: WEST PALM BEACH, Fla. (AP) — Ben Wikler, chair of the Democratic Party in Wisconsin, said Sunday he has joined the race to lead the national party after an election that swept Donald Trump and Republicans to power in Washington.
item.dc:creator: FATIMA HUSSEIN, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Trump nominates Kash Patel to lead FBI
item.description: President-elect Trump plans to nominate Kash Patel to serve as head of the FBI, elevating a staunch ally and controversial figure who sparked internal battles during the first Trump administration.
item.dc:creator: Rebecca Beitsch, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Trump picks longtime ally Kash Patel to replace current FBI director
item.description: The president-elect plans to replace current FBI Director Christopher Wray with Patel, a close ally of the president-elect and former national security aide, has berated the Justice Department and the news media.
item.dc:creator: Carrie Johnson, MPR News

item.title: Minnesotans seek long-term contraception after Trump win, worry about abortion access
item.description: While Minnesota passed the PRO Act last year protecting abortion access statewide, residents say they are still worried what the upcoming Trump-Vance administration could do.
item.dc:creator: Sam Stroozas, MPR News
